mapper.select: select count(*) from post where p_Type='V' and p_status='Y'
mapper.insert: insert into post values(SEQ_POST.nextval, #{pTitle}, #{contents}, 0, #{pDate}, #{pType}, #{userId}, default, #{isNotice}, default)
mapper.select: select p.*, u.user_name from post p join users u on p.user_id = u.user_id where p_number = #{pNumber}

select count(*) from post p join users u on p.user_id = u.user_id where p.p_type = 'V' and p.p_status='Y' and ( p.p_title like '%' || #{keyword} || '%' or p.contents like '%' || #{keyword} || '%' or u.user_name like '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )
select * from (select * from post join users using (user_id) where p_type = 'V' and p_status='Y' order by views desc) where rownum <=5

select * from(select p.*, u.user_name, nvl(l.like_count, 0) as like_count from post p join users u on p.user_id = u.user_id left join ( select p_number, count(*) as like_count from p_like group by p_number ) l on p.p_number = l.p_number where p.p_type = 'V' and p.p_status = 'Y' order by views desc) where rownum <= 5
mapper.delete: delete from p_like where user_id = #{userId} and p_number = #{pNumber}
mapper.select: select count(*) from apply where user_id=#{userId} and p_number = #{pNumber} and a_state='Y'
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM APPLY WHERE USER_ID=#{userId} AND P_NUMBER=#{pNumber}
